name: Ham & Grits Crustless Quiche
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Bring water and salt to a boil in a saucepan; stir in grits. Remove from heat; cover and let stand 5 minutes. (The mixture will be thick). Stir in milk and the remaining ingredients. Pour into a sprayed 9 1/2-inch quiche dish or a 9 1/2-inch deep-dish pie plate. Bake for 30-35 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Cut into wedges. Yield: 6 servings.
Variation: Use Italian Sausage in place of ham (saute, drain and crumble well), and eliminate mustard and hot sauce.
